description:
Secondary webhook families — handlers that update UI state cues, surface ops events, or are explicitly safe to ignore in v1 (triage tier per the T-052 event catalog).

**Scope**
- `workers/src/handlers/mdi/messages.ts` — `message_created` → surface a "new message" UI indicator in the dashboard (read state lives client-side; the underlying message bodies stay in MDI). No PHI persisted.
- `workers/src/handlers/mdi/files.ts` — `file_lab_results_processed` → audit row + dashboard cue. The file itself stays in MDI.
- `workers/src/handlers/mdi/vouchers.ts` — `voucher_created`, `voucher_used`, `voucher_expired`, `voucher_reminder_sent`. v1 behavior: log + audit only; full promo flow deferred until product asks for it.
- `workers/src/handlers/mdi/exams.ts` — `exam_*` → ops route only (no patient-facing surface yet).
- Each handler is idempotent on `event.id`.
- Events in the "safe-to-ignore-v1" tier (per T-052 triage) are explicitly registered as a no-op handler so they don't end up in DLQ.

**Acceptance**
- All event types in the T-052 catalog have a registered handler (no DLQ pollution from unknown event types).
- A `message_created` fixture triggers the dashboard cue at next page load.
title: MDI webhook handlers: messages, files, vouchers, exams
